steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content:
The passage explicitly shows OFT explaining why two species respond oppositely to the same ecological circumstance (lunar intensity)—mice foraging decreases with it, lemurs' increases.

The passage directly states “This discrepancy is explicable in terms of OFT,” tracing it to how cost-benefit trade-offs vary by species.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
B directly expresses this: OFT can account for different species responding differently to similar ecological circumstances.
  • A wrongly emphasizes benefits over costs
  • C falsely implies some species ignore cost-benefit trade-offs
  • D treats variation by species as a theory weakness when OFT is built to explain it
.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
